title: BetterHappyGhastControl
description: Optimize the operation mode of Happy Ghast
body:
### Optimize the operation mode of Happy Ghast
  * `W` horizontal advancement
  * `S` horizontal retreat
  * `A` horizontal left shift
  * `D` horizontal right shift
  * `Space` vertical rises
  * `Ctrl` vertical descent
* A version for NeoForge can be found [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/survival-plus-plus)
